generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox reducing motor speed and increasing torque for the robot's first vertical axis"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted encoder on the motor shaft measuring motor angle and velocity via optical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleVelocityData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring gearbox output angle and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleVelocityData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller via controller interface"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction - Data Transmitted
instance MotorAngleVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentData, GearboxAngleVelocityData
    base:desc "Derived torque values (τ_M, τ_G, τ_out) calculated from current and angular velocity measurements using motor-specific constants"
]

// C10: Models/Data - Engineering Models
instance StructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) describing the first vertical axis structure (motor, gearbox, cycloidal gearbox) and interconnections (rotational/torque flows)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTooling
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction components (static, kinetic, viscous) in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Stribeck friction behavior in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing LuGre friction dynamics in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ReferenceTracesModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Robot-specific dynamics model applied to generate reference data traces (motor output torque/velocity) from CNC controller data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SINUMERIKController
]

// C10: Data Traces
instance MeasuredMotorAngleVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-stamped motor angle and velocity measurements from encoder readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngleVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-stamped gearbox output angle and velocity measurements from encoder readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-stamped motor input current measurements from SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance DerivedTorqueVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (τ_M, τ_G) and velocity (ω_M, ω_G) values calculated from sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance SimulatedReferenceTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference torque/velocity outputs generated from robot dynamics models for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ReferenceTracesModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance FrictionAffectedOutputs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Friction-affected torque/velocity outputs (τr_M, τr_G) after applying friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MetadataTraceability : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Source tracing metadata including MQTT channel identifiers and sensor IDs for each data point"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorAngleVelocity, MeasuredGearboxAngleVelocity, MeasuredMotorCurrent, DerivedTorqueVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real-time streaming of sensor measurements (motor current, angles/velocities) from SINUMERIK 840D controller to digital twin"
]

instance SysMLTooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool (Block Definition Diagram/Internal Block Diagram) for structural modeling of robot's first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModel
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment for implementing and simulating friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre) and system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, ReferenceTracesModel
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing reference data traces and enabling data aggregation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReferenceTracesModel
]

instance CustomDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom visualization dashboard integrating friction-related data and model outputs for operational monitoring"
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification and refinement of white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models using live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight, ModelRefinementAction
]

instance FrictionVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction-related data (torque, angular velocity, friction loss) for operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossVisualizationInsight
]

instance ControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-based control optimization using simulation models to adjust motion accuracy by dynamically updating friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance OperationalMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of friction loss vs. simulated behavior to detect anomalies (wear, misalignment)"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the gearbox"
]

instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamically updating friction models (white-box/black-box hybrid approaches) based on real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionLossVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of friction loss vs. simulated behavior to detect anomalies"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting motion accuracy by dynamically updating friction models in control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of operational anomalies (wear, misalignment) through comparison of measured vs. simulated friction behavior"
]

// C17: Environment
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StructuralModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel,
          ReferenceTracesModel, MeasuredMotorAngleVelocity, MeasuredGearboxAngleVelocity,
          MeasuredMotorCurrent, DerivedTorqueVelocityData, SimulatedReferenceTorque,
          FrictionAffectedOutputs, MetadataTraceability, MQTTProtocol, SysMLTooling,
          MATLABSimulink, SINUMERIKController, CustomDashboard, FrictionAnalysisService,
          FrictionVisualizationService, ControlOptimizationService, OperationalMonitoringService,
          FrictionCharacterizationInsight, ModelRefinementAction, FrictionLossVisualizationInsight,
          ControlParameterAdjustmentAction, AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and dynamic**, with:
   - **Data sampling frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., motor current, encoders) is streamed continuously or in near-real-time (not explicitly quantified but implied to be high-frequency for friction analysis).
   - **Model updates**: Continuous refinement of friction models during operation, enabling adaptive control adjustments based on live data.
   - **Synchronization**: Aligned with the robot’s operational cycle (e.g., machining tasks), ensuring friction models are updated in sync with physical system dynamics."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is **single-axis focused** for the robot’s first vertical axis, but leverages:
   - **Asset Administration Shells (AAS)**: To standardize and link digital shadow components (e.g., motor, gearbox models) with physical assets.
   - **Hierarchical structure**: Combines structural (SysML) and behavioral (Simulink) models to enable multi-physics awareness (e.g., coupling friction models with torque/velocity data).
   - **No explicit mention of decentralized/twin-based orchestration**, but the methodology supports modular extension to other axes."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across the **operational lifecycle** of the robot, specifically:
   - **As-operated phase**: Focuses on **real-time friction analysis** during machining tasks to improve motion accuracy.
   - **No explicit stages for design/manufacture**, but the methodology supports integration of engineering models (e.g., SysML) for future lifecycle phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
   - **Model validation**: Comparison of simulated vs. measured data (e.g., friction-affected vs. frictionless outputs) to validate model accuracy.
   - **Uncertainty handling**: Use of dual-encoder arrangement (motor/gearbox encoders) to reduce positional uncertainty and backlash effects.
   - **Verification**: Real-time processing pipeline (e.g., MQTT + simulation models) ensures data integrity and model traceability.
   - **No explicit mention of formal validation frameworks**, but the methodology emphasizes semantic alignment and traceability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical and virtual systems uses:
   - **Network protocol**: MQTT for real-time data streaming from the robot’s CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D sl) to the digital twin.
   - **Data formats**: Sensor data (e.g., motor current, angles) and derived values (e.g., torque) are transmitted as floating-point arrays with timestamps.
   - **Interoperability**: Asset Administration Shells (AAS) enable standardized communication between physical assets and digital models."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed as:
   - **Real-time processing**: Live data is processed on-demand via MATLAB Simulink models and visualized in a custom dashboard.
   - **No explicit mention of cloud/edge deployment**, but the methodology supports distributed processing for scalability.
   - **Hardware**: Likely hosted on a local server or edge device connected to the robot’s CNC controller."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The digital twin integrates horizontally with:
   - **External systems**: Likely linked to the robot’s CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D sl) for data exchange.
   - **Standardized protocols**: Asset Administration Shells (AAS) enable interoperability with other digital assets or manufacturing systems.
   - **No explicit mention of external DTs or enterprise systems**, but the methodology supports modular extension."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
   - **Modeling standards**: SysML for structural/behavioral modeling and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for interoperability.
   - **Simulation standards**: MATLAB Simulink for executable friction models.
   - **Data standards**: MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming.
   - **No explicit mention of industry-specific standards** (e.g., IEC 62264), but the methodology supports compliance with MBSE frameworks."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The digital twin includes:
   - **Data security**: MQTT protocol with potential encryption (not specified) for secure sensor data transmission.
   - **Safety**: Real-time processing ensures no autonomous intervention in the physical system (digital shadow is passive).
   - **No explicit mention of human-robot interaction safety**, but the methodology emphasizes passive data collection for operational monitoring."
]
